summary: Flutter app called 'History Tales' — a global storytelling and historical app. Features include Firebase Auth (Google Sign-In + Phone OTP), Firestore-backed story listing and detail screens, multilingual support (English, Hindi, Gujarati), text-to-speech audio playback, dark/light theme toggle, and in-app subscription purchases (monthly/yearly under ₹200). State managed via Provider.
architectural_notes: Flutter + Firebase stack: firebase_core, firebase_auth, cloud_firestore, google_sign_in
State management via Provider (AppProvider handles darkMode, isPremium, currentLanguage)
Localization via flutter_localizations + intl (en, hi, gu supported)
Audio: audioplayers for URL-based playback; flutter_tts for on-device TTS (premium only)
In-app purchases via in_app_purchase package (product IDs: monthly_premium, yearly_premium)
Firestore stories collection uses language-suffixed fields: title_en, content_hi, audio_gu, etc.
Font: Poppins (Regular + Bold) used throughout the app
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Circular app logo featuring an open ancient book with a glowing golden compass rose over a deep sepia background, ornate border, elegant and timeless (history-tales-logo.dim_256x256.png)
- Full-page splash screen background with aged parchment paper texture, faded world map silhouette, warm amber and sepia tones, subtle vignette edges (splash-bg.dim_1200x800.png)
- Wide dashboard hero banner showing a collage of iconic world history landmarks — pyramids, colosseum, Taj Mahal — illustrated in a vintage engraving style with gold and sepia tones (dashboard-hero.dim_1200x400.png)

existing_features.title: Implement Internet Identity authentication so users can log in and have their preferences (language, premium status) persisted on-chain per principal. Show a login prompt if the user is not authenticated.
Build a splash screen that displays the app logo, the title 'History Tales', and transitions automatically to the login or dashboard screen after 3 seconds.

Build a dashboard screen that lists all stories fetched from the backend, displaying each story's title and summary in the user's selected language (English, Hindi, or Gujarati). Include a language selector and a dark/light theme toggle in the app header.

Build a story detail screen that displays the full story content in the selected language. Include a 'Read Aloud' button that uses the browser's Web Speech API to speak the story content aloud in the appropriate language (English, Hindi, or Gujarati). Reading aloud is a premium-only feature.

Build a premium subscription screen that lists two subscription tiers — Monthly Premium and Yearly Premium — with descriptions highlighting ad-free reading, advanced multilingual audio, and exclusive biographies. Include an 'Upgrade' button for each tier that updates the user's premium status in the backend.

Apply a rich, parchment-and-ink visual theme inspired by ancient manuscripts and world history — warm sepia/amber tones, aged-paper textures, serif/antiqued typography, ornamental dividers, and subtle gold accents. Enforce the theme consistently across all screens in both light and dark modes.
Render the generated app logo, splash background, and hero banner images as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a Motoko backend actor that stores historical stories with multilingual fields (title, summary, and full content in English, Hindi, and Gujarati), supports reading/listing all stories, and persists user premium status and preferred language per principal.
